hero.title: AI for Clinic Management and Growing Your Patient Base
hero.subtitle: An AI assistant that handles inquiries, books appointments, sends reminders, and follows up with patients after treatment — 24/7, without interruption.
bento.title: Key Advantages
bento.subtitle: A smart solution that lets you focus on what truly matters — your patients
bento.card1.title: Instant response, 24/7, in every language
bento.card1.desc: Every inquiry gets an instant, accurate automated reply — day or night. The assistant answers common questions, qualifies leads, and routes complex cases to your team, so no patient waits and no opportunity is missed.
bento.card3.title: Tailored for clinics
bento.card3.subtitle: Using the Optima system
bento.card4.title: Never lose another patient
bento.card4.desc: Every patient on follow-up who's not on the calendar can slip away — costing the clinic patients and leaving money on the table. With our smart system, every patient stays on a follow-up list that organizes the clinic, streamlines booking, and brings patients back.
bento.chatQuestions: When can I book an appointment?
How do I prepare for my visit?
How much does a check-up cost?
Can I get a reminder before my appointment?
value.title: Value for Business Owners
value.card1.title: Smart Follow-Up & Returning Past Patients
value.card1.desc: The agent manages your patient database and follow-up lists on its own — for example, messaging patients not on the calendar and booking appointments in Optima fully automatically. It also organizes lists for reception so no patient falls through the cracks, keeping the clinic running efficiently.
value.card1.visual.footer: Organized for reception — no patient slips through
value.card2.title: Smart Alerts & Post-Treatment Care
value.card2.desc: Every patient gets a pre-treatment alert with personalized instructions, and the agent marks arrival in Optima, handles cancellations, rescheduling, and any pre-visit questions on its own — with zero involvement from reception. After treatment, the agent checks on the patient's wellbeing, provides guidance, and collects reviews for the clinic.
value.card2.visual.step2Text: Arrival in Optima · auto cancel & reschedule
value.card3.title: Statistics Dashboard & Smart Insights
value.card3.desc: A smart control panel displays your clinic's performance in real time — inquiry volume, conversion rates, cancellations, and patients waiting for appointments. Get insights that help you spot opportunities, improve processes, and make data-driven decisions.
value.card3.visual.title: Dashboard
value.card3.visual.insight: 5 patients waiting for appointment — conversion opportunity
value.card4.title: Warm, Human-Like Responses
value.card4.desc: Felix responds with warmth and a human touch — in Hebrew, Russian, and English. The agent reads each patient's needs, personalizes the reply, and escalates complex cases to your team. Your patients feel they're in good hands — even when the clinic is closed.
value.card4.visual.msgPatient1: I'm a bit anxious before the treatment...
value.card4.visual.msgBot1: That's completely understandable 💙 I'll walk you through exactly what to expect
value.card4.visual.msgBot2: Always here for you — complex case escalated to the team

faq.title: Questions & Answers
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Felix for your dental clinic
faq.items.0.question: What is Felix?
faq.items.0.answer: Felix is an AI-powered assistant for dental clinics. It answers patient questions, books and reschedules appointments, sends reminders, and syncs with your CRM — 24/7 across WhatsApp, SMS, your website, and other channels.
faq.items.1.question: Does Felix integrate with my clinic software?
faq.items.1.answer: Yes. Felix connects directly to Optima — Israel's leading dental CRM — so patient records, appointments, and updates stay in sync without duplicate data entry or manual work.
faq.items.2.question: How long does setup take?
faq.items.2.answer: Most clinics go live within a few days. Our team configures Felix for your workflows, connects your CRM and communication channels, and trains the assistant on your clinic's services and policies.
faq.items.3.question: Which communication channels does Felix support?
faq.items.3.answer: Felix works across WhatsApp, SMS, your website chat, and social media — wherever your patients already reach out. All conversations are handled in one place with consistent, professional responses.
faq.items.4.question: Is patient data secure?
faq.items.4.answer: Patient privacy is a top priority. Felix follows strict data protection practices, and all information is handled securely in compliance with applicable privacy regulations.
faq.items.5.question: Will Felix replace my front desk team?
faq.items.5.answer: No — Felix handles routine inquiries, scheduling, and reminders so your team can focus on in-clinic care and complex cases. It reduces workload without replacing the human touch where it matters most.
